title: luciola pilosa
side_effects: Luciola pilosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues. Ingesting the plant's leaves or roots can cause vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach pain, while prolonged exposure to its sap can lead to skin lesions and rashes. In severe cases, improper use of Luciola pilosa can cause anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional or a qualified herbalist before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
